ddls:
CREATE TABLE "books" (
  "book_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each book */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the book */,
  "year_of_publication" INTEGER /* Year the book was published */,
  "number_of_chapters" INTEGER /* Number of chapters in the book */,
  "number_of_pages" INTEGER /* Number of pages in the book */,
  "amazon_rank" TEXT /* Current Amazon rank of the book */,
  "author_id" INTEGER /* ID of the author of the book */,
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* ID of the genre the book belongs to */,
  "publication_house_id" INTEGER /* ID of the publication house that published the book */,
  "isbn" TEXT /* ISBN of the book */,
  "publication_date" TEXT /* Specific date when the book was published */,
  "cover_type" TEXT /* Type of cover (e.g., hardcover, paperback) */,
  "language" TEXT /* Language in which the book is written */,
  "price" TEXT /* Price of the book */,
  "stock_quantity" INTEGER /* Number of copies available in stock */,
  "synopsis" TEXT /* Brief summary of the book's content */,
  "series" TEXT /* Name of the series if the book is part of a series */,
  "volume" TEXT /* Volume number if the book is part of a series */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("book_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_books_genre_id FOREIGN KEY ("genre_id") REFERENCES genres ("genre_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_books_author_id FOREIGN KEY ("author_id") REFERENCES authors ("author_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_books_publication_house_id FOREIGN KEY ("publication_house_id") REFERENCES publication_houses ("publication_house_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "authors" (
  "author_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each author */,
  "author_name" TEXT /* Full name of the author */,
  "biography" TEXT /* Biography of the author */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the author */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Author's date of birth */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Author's nationality */,
  "website" TEXT /* Author's website URL */,
  "social_media" TEXT /* Author's social media handles */,
  "photo_url" TEXT /* URL to the author's photo */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("author_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "genres" (
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each genre */,
  "genre_name" TEXT /* Name of the genre (e.g., Fantasy, Science Fiction) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the genre */,
  "parent_genre" INTEGER /* ID of the parent genre to support hierarchical genres */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Flag to indicate if the genre is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("genre_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "publication_houses" (
  "publication_house_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each publication house */,
  "publication_house_name" TEXT /* Name of the publication house */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the publication house */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the publication house */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the publication house was founded */,
  "ceo" TEXT /* Name of the CEO of the publication house */,
  "website" TEXT /* URL to the publication house's website */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the publication house */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("publication_house_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sales_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sales log */,
  "book_id" INTEGER /* ID of the book sold */,
  "sale_date" TEXT /* Date of the sale */,
  "quantity_sold" INTEGER /* Quantity of the book sold */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location where the sale occurred */,
  "revenue" TEXT /* Total revenue generated from the sale */,
  "order_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the order */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method of payment (e.g., credit card, PayPal) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_logs_book_id FOREIGN KEY ("book_id") REFERENCES books ("book_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "book_id" INTEGER /* ID of the book being reviewed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who submitted the review */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the user (1-5) */,
  "comment" TEXT /* Comment provided by the user */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date the review was submitted */,
  "helpful_votes" INTEGER /* Number of users who found the review helpful */,
  "unhelpful_votes" INTEGER /* Number of users who found the review unhelpful */,
  "is_approved" INTEGER /* Flag to indicate if the review has been approved by a moderator */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_book_id FOREIGN KEY ("book_id") REFERENCES books ("book_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., author, editor, sales manager) */,
  "date_joined" TEXT /* Date the user joined the platform */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* User's account status (e.g., active, suspended) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role FOREIGN KEY ("role") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "book_genres" (
  "book_genre_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each book-genre relationship */,
  "book_id" INTEGER /* ID of the book */,
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* ID of the genre */,
  "is_primary" INTEGER /* Flag to indicate if the genre is the primary genre for the book */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("book_genre_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_book_genres_genre_id FOREIGN KEY ("genre_id") REFERENCES genres ("genre_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_book_genres_book_id FOREIGN KEY ("book_id") REFERENCES books ("book_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions assigned to the role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the role was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the role was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)
